name: unysonplus-site-capture
description: Local capture service + AI companion + CLI for the Unyson+ Site Converter: render a (JS) website in headless Chrome and produce a Convert bundle .zip, and (with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set) refine a conversion mapping + write matching CSS via Claude. Run `npx unysonplus-site-capture` to start the service the WordPress admin's Site Converter talks to.
author: UnysonPlus
